title: SafeSandDupers
description: Restores sand duper functionality on paper/purpur without creating a security risk
body:
This plugin allows you to have sand dupers on paper/pupur servers

# Config
Simply set the world to where falling blocks should be teleported, and the position to where in that world it should be teleported. Y can be set to auto for the Y coordinate to be determined automatically

# How does it work?
This plugin simply creates a new fallingblock entity with the same material and velocity.
